last_comments: Attempted commit after targeted verification, but repo pre-commit is currently blocked by unrelated failing tests in tools/cli/ship/internal/commands: alpha contract golden drift, cross-lane dependency matrix red spec, describe module adoption metadata contract, runtime report handshake envelope, upgrade readiness help contract, and verify orchestration preflight contract. Targeted ticket slice remains green: go test ./config ./framework/runtimeplan ./framework/runtimeconfig.

Moved the ticket work into dedicated worktree .worktrees/TKT-198 and revalidated the scoped tests there. Commit is still blocked by repo doctor baseline errors, now reduced to existing DX020 module-isolation violations in notifications/paidsubscriptions/storage module files plus one DX010 warning in tools/cli/ship/internal/commands/db.go. The previous command-package red specs that blocked pre-commit were fixed in this branch, but Docket review transition still requires a linked commit before TKT-198 can move to in-review.

Per request, ran go test ./... before a no-verify commit attempt. Current failing packages on this branch: app/foundation (TestCacheClient_GroupTagAndTTLContract memory case), app/web/controllers (TestManagedSettingsViewData_MapsManagedStatus), framework/backup (accepted_manifest_version red spec), and framework/security (missing control-plane doc + managed hook signature vector red spec). These are not resolved in this ticket branch.
